[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235601:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)

Peter, big announcement:

_**I 'M GOING TO MATCH EVERY DONATION TO THIS COMMITTEE WITH MY OWN MONEY FOR THE REST OF AUGUST.**_

[**SO MAKE A DONATION NOW AND YOUR MONEY WILL GO TWICE AS FAR!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235601:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)

This is a critical time for our campaign. Once Labor Day weekend is over, the fall election season is really underway, and that means non-stop attack ads from Crooked Hillary and her team of liars.

But Crooked Hillary's attacks are meaningless. Everyone knows she is not honest! And patriotic, fed-up Americans are joining our movement every day so we can take back our country.

This is the best time you will ever have to join our campaign. Your donation will be doubled, going twice as far to fund our pro-America message just as Crooked Hillary begins ramping up her desperate smear campaign.

[**You can make an immediate impact with a gift of $250, $100, $50, or $25 by following this secure link.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235601:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)

We need to keep all our momentum going and enter the fall campaign season strong enough to take on Crooked Hillary, all the Super PAC's (stuffed with money from lobbyists) supporting her, and of course her cheerleaders in the liberal media.

**That 's why I decided that if we raise another $1 million before midnight on August 31st, _I will personally write my own check for $1 million, to match every contribution dollar-for-dollar. _**

So I'm asking you to make a contribution to our movement, helping us hit our fundraising goal and doubling the impact of your support to put America back on a winning path?

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $500 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235602:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $200 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235603:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $100 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235604:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $25 = $50 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235605:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235601:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)**

The career politicians have been a total disaster in Washington. Jobs are gone, crime is up, and the border is wide open. Frankly, the politicians are only good at one thing: keeping themselves in power.

Those days need to be over, but you and I need to work together to make it happen. We need to run the most powerful Republican campaign in history.

**That is what it will take to send Crooked Hillary down to defeat along with her liberal allies in Congress.**

Stand with our campaign TODAY to help us head into the fall campaign from a position of strength.

[**I will personally match every dollar you donate right now, so our combined money will make a big impact in the fight to defeat Crooked Hillary.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235601:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)

You're the best,

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235601:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)

Donald J. Trump

Republican Nominee for President of the United States

P.S. There aren't a whole lot of deals out there where you can immediately double your money. But that's what I am offering you right now: [**donate to our campaign and I will instantly match your entire gift, and together you and I will defeat Crooked Hillary and Make America Great Again!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37235601:s5RPZrbNu:m:1:876315805:664DB418705C6AA03B9178584304106F:r)

Our end of month FEC deadline is coming up. Here’s what I’m going to do. |

Peter, You, and millions like you, are the reason we won the primary. And you will be the reason we win again this November. When our message is heard by the voters, we win. It happened in the primaries, and it will happen again in the general election -- believe me. Hillary Clinton knows this too. Which is why she’s reserving $8O million in attack ads to stop the American people from hearing our message of a safer, freer, and more prosperous nation. I’ve set a $1O million end-of-month goal so that we can get our WINNING message to every single voter. But we must hit it by the FEC deadline on August 31 at 11:59 PM. To start us off, I am writing a $1 MILLION MATCHING CHECK of my own money. Now join me, Peter, by making a contribution, and I will proudly MATCH it up to $1 million. CONTRIBUTE $100 >> FOR A $200 MATCH CONTRIBUTE $65 >> FOR A $130 MATCH CONTRIBUTE $25 >> FOR A $50 MATCH CONTRIBUTE $15 >> FOR A $30 MATCH CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Hillary Clinton believes that you don’t stand a chance against her crooked network of lobbyists and special interests. She believes that she can sell our country to the highest bidder -- with ZERO repercussions from the American people. But she’s dead wrong. She is underestimating the American people. November 8, 2016 is our moment to prove to the Clinton Machine that the American people are sick and tired of watching the elites try to sell our country to the highest bidder. They will see what happens when the people of this country are silenced. They will learn that there is nothing stronger than the moral courage of the American people. And, Peter, I’m asking you to be one of the millions who proves them wrong.

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: time to get serious
body:
Peter,

It's time to get serious about 2016.

There are less than 3 months until Election Day and **only 3 days left until our August deadline**.

If Hillary Clinton and the Democrats win the White House and Senate, _they will have free rein to implement their progressive agenda for decades to come._

**A Republican Senate majority is our only chance to stop them.**

**_It 's now or never. _**We owe it to the next generation of Americans to do everything you can to help us defend our Republican values and our Republican Senate majority.

**TAKE ACTION NOW:** **[Stand AGAINST Hillary Clinton and with our Republican team with your donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to ensure a Republican victory this November >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37247133:sGAeAAbNL:m:1:1155937413:F9A8F091D95FC3624EE873E1A4B595CC:r)**

---
**Republicans cannot win this without you.**
Every dollar provides valuable resources for our Republican Senate campaigns that they might not have otherwise. Television, internet, radio ads, yard signs, literature, campaign staff...** _it all adds up._**

Your support makes sure our Republican team has the tools they need to win.
**ALL DONATIONS WILL BE TRIPLE-MATCHED**
**Stand with our Republican Senate team:**
[Pitch in $35 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37247134:sGAeAAbNL:m:1:1155937413:F9A8F091D95FC3624EE873E1A4B595CC:r)

[Pitch in $50 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37247135:sGAeAAbNL:m:1:1155937413:F9A8F091D95FC3624EE873E1A4B595CC:r)

[Pitch in $100 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37247136:sGAeAAbNL:m:1:1155937413:F9A8F091D95FC3624EE873E1A4B595CC:r)

[Pitch in $150 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37247137:sGAeAAbNL:m:1:1155937413:F9A8F091D95FC3624EE873E1A4B595CC:r)

[Pitch in another amount immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37247138:sGAeAAbNL:m:1:1155937413:F9A8F091D95FC3624EE873E1A4B595CC:r)

I am confident that with your help, our Republican team will achieve a tremendous victory this November and preserve our country for future generations.

Thank you for everything,

Newt Gingrich

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: slipping away
body:
What a dollar today does for our organizing team | Derek --

Just a few days from now, voters in a handful of states will start to receive their absentee ballots in the mail. A few days after that, polling places around the country will open their doors for early voting to begin. A few weeks after that, it will be Election Day.

Time is slipping away from us, which means it's time to begin prepping for the next phase of this campaign: Get Out the Vote.

Right this minute, we are finalizing our plans, hiring organizers, and recruiting thousands of volunteers to have the one-on-one conversations that will turn out voters in November.

But I’m not going to lie -- running a campaign the right way and mobilizing a national operation don’t come cheap.

**[We’ve set a huge goal of raising $10 million in one week(!) to help make sure we can run our ground game at scale. Can you chip in to get a free sticker and help us get there?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYzNTU1ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODQzMTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We’re thrifty on this campaign, and we know how to stretch a donation to its limits. We’re planning a GOTV operation that is smart, effective, and strategic.

But there are supplies we absolutely need to do this work. We're buying clipboards to hold the packets that organizers will use to canvass neighborhoods. We're buying ballpoint pens and sticky notes and printers. You would not believe how much toner we're buying -- or what it takes to print all those walk packets. We just approved an order for a concierge call bell -- like you used to see at hotels -- for the front desk at a field office in Allentown, Pennsylvania (so they never have to keep a prospective volunteer waiting). It cost $6.

That's all to say that everything you can chip in now has taken on new importance. There is no magic wand or secret weapon to this part of the campaign. It’s about doors knocked, calls made, and voters registered.

**Derek, we need you to step up today with a quick donation and get us to our $10 million goal before September 1st. Anything less will prevent us from earning every vote we can for Hillary. And if we don’t do this work better than the other side, we will lose:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNTU1ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODQzMTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- now let’s get to work,

Michelle

Michelle Kleppe
National Organizing Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzNTU1ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODQzMTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

clean_body: What a dollar today does for our organizing team | Derek -- Just a few days from now, voters in a handful of states will start to receive their absentee ballots in the mail. A few days after that, polling places around the country will open their doors for early voting to begin. A few weeks after that, it will be Election Day. Time is slipping away from us, which means it's time to begin prepping for the next phase of this campaign: Get Out the Vote. Right this minute, we are finalizing our plans, hiring organizers, and recruiting thousands of volunteers to have the one-on-one conversations that will turn out voters in November. But I’m not going to lie -- running a campaign the right way and mobilizing a national operation don’t come cheap. We’re thrifty on this campaign, and we know how to stretch a donation to its limits. We’re planning a GOTV operation that is smart, effective, and strategic. But there are supplies we absolutely need to do this work. We're buying clipboards to hold the packets that organizers will use to canvass neighborhoods. We're buying ballpoint pens and sticky notes and printers. You would not believe how much toner we're buying -- or what it takes to print all those walk packets. We just approved an order for a concierge call bell -- like you used to see at hotels -- for the front desk at a field office in Allentown, Pennsylvania (so they never have to keep a prospective volunteer waiting). It cost $6. That's all to say that everything you can chip in now has taken on new importance. There is no magic wand or secret weapon to this part of the campaign. It’s about doors knocked, calls made, and voters registered. Derek, we need you to step up today with a quick donation and get us to our $10 million goal before September 1st. Anything less will prevent us from earning every vote we can for Hillary. And if we don’t do this work better than the other side, we will lose: Thanks -- now let’s get to work, Michelle Michelle Kleppe National Organizing Director Hillary for America | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team: | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). I just updated my spreadsheets, and if we're going to keep our fundraising on track and bounce back in the polls, we need to raise another $75,000 before the August 31 deadline.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7d8/2a380d31/11c298c4/fa6306/2830231342/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNjA3Mjdfc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwODI4YW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20160727_sticker?refcode=e20160828am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Maggie doesn't rely on corporate special interests or secretive dark money groups to fund her campaign. She's counting on thousands of grassroots supporters like you from all across the Granite State to give whatever you can. And in a race as close as this one, your grassroots gift could make the difference between winning and losing here in New Hampshire:
**[Please give $3 or more right now to hit our $75,000 goal so we can elect Maggie Hassan, take back the Senate, and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7d8/2a380d31/11c298c4/fa6306/2830231342/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNjA3Mjdfc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwODI4YW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20160727_sticker?refcode=e20160828am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")** **Hitting this goal is so important -- if you make your first gift now, we'll send you a free official campaign sticker.**
Kelly Ayotte's GOP backers (like groups linked to Mitch McConnell, Karl Rove and the Koch Brothers) have launched over $24 million in ads against Maggie, and now the polls have tightened into a virtual tie. Corporate special interests think they can buy this seat, Senate control, and the chance to confirm as many as FOUR Supreme Court justices. **Team, we can't let that happen.**
If we secure the resources we need to compete in a race this close, we can elect Maggie and take back the Senate, but it won't happen without you:
**[My records indicate that you may be able to give $3. Please donate whatever you can now to win in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7d8/2a380d31/11c298c4/fa6306/2830231342/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNjA3Mjdfc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwODI4YW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20160727_sticker?refcode=e20160828am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")** **Remember, if you make your first gift before the deadline, we'll send you the official Maggie Hassan campaign sticker.**
Counting on you.
Emily Mellencamp Smith
Finance Director, Maggie for NH

Take Mary, for example. She's in the office twice a month, and she brings our team delicious lemon poppy seed bread. Mary's a retired teacher who volunteers her time because she knows electing Russ will point Wisconsin back in the right direction for educators and students.
And we have volunteers like Phill, who's in college and is so excited to be working for Russ -- and not just because they're both Badgers! Phill knows Russ will fight to make sure that middle-class and working families can send their kids to college without the crushing burden of student loan debt.
Volunteers like Mary and Phill show up as often as they can, and do as much as they can, _because electing Russ is personal for them_. They know he's the only candidate in this race with a proven track record of fighting for everyday people like them, not special interest groups.
**They know Russ always puts the people of Wisconsin first. And that's why they pitch in.**
**[Now, I'm asking: Can you pitch in, too? We're less than four days out from our deadline of raising $150,000. Contribute $3 today and help us get there.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf449b/1c469400/71aeead/3574ce4/3041070334/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-28_EOM2_3test&refcode=ema_2016-08-28_EOM2_3test&utm_campaign=EOM2&utm_medium=ema")**
It's people like Mary and Phill -- and supporters like you, friend -- who inspire me to work harder than ever. I know this team has what it takes to bring home a win in November.
Thanks,
Sarah Lindstrom

body:
Preparing for the Republican attacks. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTQyMzIzOQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgyMjEzNzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, I'll get straight to the point. In 48 hours, Republican Donald Trump is making his foray into Washington. Trump and our Republican opponent Bill Bryant, and their billionaire backers like the RGA, believe our state can be flipped from blue to red this year -- just like what happened in Maryland and Massachusetts two years ago. In fact, Trump and the head of the RGA are on record boasting that winning Washington is a priority. We can't afford to take anything for granted -- not when our opponent can unload nearly one million dollars in TV ads in a matter of days. This is the most volatile election cycle in a generation. Things will change quickly. She has an unbelievable mountain of campaign cash to attack me 24/7 nationwide until November 8th. I’m a businessman, not a politician... Which is why I would like to ask you to partner with me and make a contribution of $100, $65, $25 or even $15 and help us beat her in November. name: Tim Kaine
subject: We’re not hitting our goals, Derek
body:
We're down to the wire | Derek --

I don’t want to wake up on November 9th and feel like we didn’t give it our all.

But right now, we’re not hitting our goals, and that needs to change. Quickly. If we don’t outraise Trump this month -- before the fundraising deadline on August 31st -- the public donor report published by the Federal Election Commission will show that his team is stronger than ours.

And they'll start September even more confident they can beat us.

**[Chip in right now to help us hit our goal of $10 million (and grab a free sticker!) so that when the report is released, everyone knows we’re the stronger team.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYzNTc2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTE4MzA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We’re down to the wire for August -- we have to meet our benchmark and show the public we’re stronger. **Chip in now to make sure Trump knows we mean business, and have no intention of letting him take this election on November 9th:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzNTc2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTE4MzA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
This is still a little new for me, Derek -- it’s just my second fundraising deadline of the campaign, and I want to do everything I can to help us blow it out of the water. I can’t wait to see what we do together.

Thanks,

Tim

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNTc2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTE4MzA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

** Check out this article Jason just sent me. You saw it, I saw it, and now the rest of Washington is seeing it: Jay Inslee can’t rise to a challenge.

If you agree that a second term for Jay Inslee would be even more devastating for our state, please contribute to my campaign. Only with your support can we bring new leadership to Washington.

[*Quick Contribute*](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.BillBryantForGovernor.com%2Fsupport&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymu0828&n=2)

Subject: ICYMI Inslee dodges challenger’s jabs

******Schwartz Commentary: Inslee Just Playing It Safe, Dodges Challenger’s Jabs
** _by Eric Schwartz_ Spectators of combat sports often boo and hiss when two fighters seem more concerned with the scorecard than physically battering one another in the ring. Sure, the participants throw punches, but they can be rare and come only after a good deal of dancing in circles as the clock winds down. The higher you go in the political ranks, the more likely the candidates are to practice a similar form of soft gamesmanship. In state races, there’s a large enough pool of voters entrenched in their ideology that candidates from the Democratic Party are often able to glide to victory on empty statements, vague political dueling and ideas that rarely venture from the party platform. In conservative Lewis County, the same can often be said for Republicans in local races. But let’s focus the current battle between incumbent Gov. Jay Inslee and his hard-charging challenger, Bill Bryant. So far, it seems Inslee is content to largely leave policy out of his defense of the governor’s mansion, instead deploying one-liners and trying with every bone in his body to connect Bryant, a moderate, with the sometimes questionable words and actions of presidential nominee Donald Trump. The biggest knock on world champion boxer Floyd Mayweather has always been his penchant for avoiding punches en route to win after win. His greatest skill seems to be slipping past jabs, landing a few soft blows and then standing in victory when the scorecard is returned in his favor after a boring and uninspiring fight. Inslee is a career politician who can dance around the political ring with the best of them. We saw that in the debate in Spokane earlier this month, and it’s evident again in the silence that has followed Bryant’s request for a debate focused solely on the issues of homelessness and mental health. Inslee hasn’t responded to the request, in which Bryant notes the state’s poor standing in national rankings of states based on mental health treatment and homelessness (Bryant claims a 42 percent increase in homelessness in King County since Inslee took office and that Washington ranks 47th in the nation in quality of mental health and 50th in mental care for adults). There’s local applications to these matters, considering the recent debate in Chehalis over the existence of a homeless camp and in Centralia on the construction of a mental health facility. It might have been surprising in the past to have a Republican beg a Democrat for a debate on the government-provided safety net for the most vulnerable, but Bryant is a lot closer to the center than most of his predecessors. Inslee, standing outside the ring looking in and polling ahead of his opponent, has little to gain by allowing Bryant an opportunity to take swings at his record, which has been battered in its own right over the past year. That’s too bad. Mental illness and homelessness are two issues that routinely get shoved to the margins. Those who suffer from either affliction aren’t exactly a strong voting block, after all. A gubernatorial debate stage would be the perfect platform to bring the issues to the forefront and enable us to apply the ideas exchanged to our own situations in Lewis County. Still, let’s not pretend Bryant’s not using political tactics of his own in pressing the request. A press release Thursday included Bill Bryant standing amid “The Jungle,” a nickname for a large homeless camp in Seattle, looking off into the distance with a contemplative and pained expression. It’s the equivalent of the No. 1 heavyweight boxing contender standing in the middle of the ring at Madison Square Garden and mocking the champ in — and for — his absence. I don’t expect such gamesmanship will ever be erased from the political landscape, but I do hope Bryant succeeds in his goal of drawing a meaningful debate on two very important tactics. In this case, the spectators continue to be the people of Washington, and I think they deserve to see something other than the current champion dodging his challenger. **[Original Link](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.chronline.com%2Fopinion%2Fschwartz-commentary-inslee-just-playing-it-safe-dodges-challenger-s%2Farticle_8032b480-6c00-11e6-9444-3f4e6bb031e1.html&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymu0828&n=3)**

We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymu0828&n=5) from these messages.

| Greetings,
---
| I am writing to you today because we have a very important fundraising deadline tomorrow and I need your help! Our Democratic opponent has proven her ability to consistently raise sizable funds from out of state donors and special interest groups. Without your support, our opponent will out-raise and out-spend us going into a crucial stage in this election! Vermont’s future is too important for us to allow that to happen. [**That is why I'm asking you to donate to our campaign today!**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f6e56a210c&e=19cebfe173)

There is a very clear choice this election. I’m the only candidate who is focused on growing our economy, making Vermont more affordable and restoring Vermonters' faith and trust in their government. I’ve set [_strict budget limits_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f69da27e2b&e=19cebfe173) ; I have a plan to [_modernize state government_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4f15265b42&e=19cebfe173) ; a [_plan to_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a5490ff50e&e=19cebfe173) _[combat the opiate crisis](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=565ac3833f&e=19cebfe173)_ ; and real ideas to address our crumbling [_infrastructure_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f21e489a08&e=19cebfe173). In the coming weeks I will be rolling out a comprehensive economic development plan to reinforce my commitment to creating jobs. If you’re tired of the tax and spend direction of our state, I’m the candidate to put us on a more sustainable path.

We have yet to hear from Sue about any proposal to reign in spending. In fact, her “plans” call for various new taxes and more fees! Vermonters cannot afford more of the same failed policies we have seen the past 6 years. They are eager for change and so am I!

**[Can I count on you to donate $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 today?](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=798e6e9e40&e=19cebfe173)**

[_**Our next fundraising deadline is tomorrow night at midnight! Please donate today. With your help we can ensure a more affordable Vermont.**_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=375b34c792&e=19cebfe173)

Thank you for your support!

Phil

subject: We have to raise $10 million before Wednesday
body:
Why this deadline matters: | Derek, August 31st is a big day for the campaign. It marks our next FEC deadline and our next opportunity to show the world this team’s commitment to taking down Donald Trump. And that's HUGE -- because after Labor Day, we need people excited to be part of this team and ready to show up when it matters most.

**[That’s why it’s so important to hit our goals for the end of August -- we need to raise $10 million online to stay on track and prove we’re the strongest campaign and strongest team in this election. Can you chip in right now to get a free sticker and help that happen?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNTg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTQ5MTc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

August 31st is also the last FEC deadline before early or absentee voting begins in states all over the country: September 9th in North Carolina, September 22nd in Wisconsin, September 23rd in Minnesota and Vermont, September 24th in Virginia and Michigan, and September 29th in Iowa and Illinois.

That’s almost 100 electoral votes right there -- that’s almost halfway to 270. And once a ballot gets cast, there's no undoing it. That means we have just a few weeks to dedicate to getting out the vote in these states and persuading voters to show up for Hillary. The clock is ticking -- and we have to step up.

**Can you show you’re with Hillary right now and chip in to be on a team that’s fighting its heart out for every dollar and every vote in every single state?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNTg0NTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTQ5MTc4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- we’re in the home stretch and every cent counts.

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of States and Political Engagement
Hillary for America
